overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit shantytown under a massive overpass at night. The scene features makeshift tents, campfires, and NPCs in a dystopian urban environment with heavy pink neon lighting and wet ground surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved commercial walkway alongside convenience store

events.description: approaching the edge of the paved walkway where it meets the dirt encampment area

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved path next to the NiCola convenience store, approaching the overpass structure

entered.detail: commercial building with illuminated NiCola signage and pink neon accents
large red patio umbrella sheltering an outdoor seating area
derelict silver vehicle parked under the red umbrella
massive concrete and steel overpass with prominent pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a paved concrete walkway alongside a commercial building with bright NiCola signage. A large red umbrella and abandoned car sit to the left. The camera moves forward toward a massive overpass structure glowing with pink neon lights in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shantytown encampment under overpass with tents and campfires

events.description: ground surface transitions from concrete sidewalk to dirt and dry grass
passing the first group of tents and a burning barrel with people sitting nearby

agents.ego_description: moving through the dirt area under the overpass, navigating around debris and sandbags

notable_agents.action: person sitting near a burning barrel in front of a red and white tent

entered.detail: stacked green military sandbags forming a defensive barrier
red and white dome tent set up as temporary shelter
metal barrel with active fire providing warmth and light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from pavement onto dirt ground under the massive overpass, now surrounded by pink neon lights. The scene reveals a shantytown with tents, sandbag barricades, and a burning barrel where a person sits warming themselves.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense encampment area with abandoned vehicles and shipping containers

events.description: slowing down while approaching two men conversing near a purple container

agents.ego_description: navigating through the encampment, passing wrecked cars and approaching a group near a shipping container

notable_agents.action: man sitting on a mattress next to a wrecked blue car
two men talking near a purple container, one standing with crossed arms

entered.detail: large purple corrugated metal shipping container used as shelter
damaged blue sedan with open doors and missing windows
large orange patio umbrella sheltering an outdoor seating area

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the encampment, the camera passes a man sitting by a wrecked car and approaches two men conversing near a purple shipping container. The area is cluttered with debris, and an orange umbrella provides shelter near the container.

scene_state.functional_zone: improvised seating area between shipping container and metal barricades

events.description: camera circles around the two men, observing them from multiple angles

agents.ego_description: approaching and closely observing two men near the container, circling around them to see their interaction

notable_agents.action: standing man with bandana, crossed arms, and tactical vest
seated man with cybernetic head implants and glowing blue goggles holding a cup

entered.detail: red and blue plastic chairs arranged around a small table
concrete and metal construction barriers forming a wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to two men conversing near the purple container - one standing with crossed arms wearing a bandana, the other seated with prominent cybernetic head implants. The camera circles around them, showing plastic chairs, a small table, and construction barriers in the tight space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt area under overpass with scattered debris

events.description: turning away from the two men and walking back into the open encampment area

agents.ego_description: leaving the container area and walking back into the open shantytown space under the overpass

entered.detail: large amusement park ferris wheel visible in the distant background
bright pink fluorescent tubes running along the steel beams of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the two men and walks back into the open area under the overpass, revealing the full span of the pink neon-lit structure overhead and a distant ferris wheel visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a commercial city walkway into the heart of a neon-lit shantytown sheltered beneath a massive overpass. It begins on a paved concrete path beside bright NiCola signage and an abandoned car, moving steadily toward a distant structure glowing with pink light. As the camera transitions from pavement to dirt, the environment shifts into a cluttered encampment filled with tents, sandbag barricades, and a person warming themselves by a burning barrel. The movement continues deeper into the settlement, passing a wrecked car and an orange umbrella before circling closely around two men—one with cybernetic implants—conversing near a purple shipping container. Finally, the camera turns away from the pair and retreats into the open area, revealing the full expanse of the pink neon overpass and a distant ferris wheel shimmering through the haze.
